compiled_state.title: Write failing tests for relates_to drift detection in sprint-drift-check.sh
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## Description

Write failing tests in tests/scripts/test-sprint-drift-check.sh for the new relates_to drift detection behavior. These tests must fail before the implementation exists (RED phase).

### Test Scenarios
1. **relates_to neighbor closed after impl plan** — mock epic with a relates_to link to a closed epic whose closure timestamp > impl plan timestamp → assert RELATES_TO_DRIFT emitted with the closed epic ID
2. **relates_to neighbor closed before impl plan** — closure timestamp < impl plan timestamp → assert NO RELATES_TO_DRIFT emitted
3. **empty relates_to set** — epic with no relates_to links → assert clean exit, no RELATES_TO_DRIFT, existing behavior unchanged
4. **ticket CLI failure on neighbor lookup** — mock ticket CLI that fails for the related epic → assert warning to stderr, continues without error, exits 0
5. **PREPLANNING_CONTEXT timestamp preferred** — when PREPLANNING_CONTEXT comment exists with generatedAt → assert that timestamp is used (not child created_at)
6. **fallback to children timestamp** — when no PREPLANNING_CONTEXT → assert earliest child created_at is used

### File Impact
- tests/scripts/test-sprint-drift-check.sh (modify — add new test functions)

### Implementation Notes
- Extend the existing mock ticket CLI helper (_make_ticket_cli) to support relates_to links in the deps array
- Mock epic ticket show output must include deps with relation=relates_to
- Use the same assertion library (assert.sh) as existing tests
- Each test should be independent and clean up after itself

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test file has at least 4 new test functions for relates_to drift scenarios
  Verify: grep -c "test_relates_to\|test_rt_drift\|test_empty_relates" tests/scripts/test-sprint-drift-check.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 4)}'
- [ ] Tests assert on RELATES_TO_DRIFT output signal
  Verify: grep -q "RELATES_TO_DRIFT" tests/scripts/test-sprint-drift-check.sh
- [ ] Tests cover empty relates_to edge case
  Verify: grep -q "empty.*relates_to\|no.*relates_to\|relates_to.*empty" tests/scripts/test-sprint-drift-check.sh
- [ ] Tests cover pre-existing closure (no trigger) scenario
  Verify: grep -q "before.*impl\|pre.existing\|closed_before" tests/scripts/test-sprint-drift-check.sh
- [ ] All existing tests still pass
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-sprint-drift-check.sh
